patch.value: Baseline agent token cost of the CLI surface: measure pm --help, per-command help, and contracts payload sizes before consolidation

Establish the before numbers the simplification epic is judged against: token/byte size of pm --help, sum of per-command --help, contracts --full, and MCP tool-list payloads, committed as a small measurement script + recorded snapshot. Duplicate check: no existing measurement/baseline item for surface size.

Repeatable script reports byte+approx-token counts for pm --help, all command helps, contracts --full, and MCP tool list; baseline snapshot recorded in the item body/notes; script reusable for the after-comparison

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Baseline evidence already measured by the 2026-07-05 external dogfood audit (record here so the chore starts from data): pm contracts --json 25,118 B; --availability-only 24,666 B; --action create 63,534 B; --full 520,414 B. Output-shape costs: pm list --limit 20 = 2,552 B TOON vs 3,773 B JSON (+48%); pm context = 4,582 vs 7,034 (+53%); trivial create echo 368 B vs 29 B --id-only (12.7x); tags = 43% of context brief output. Re-measure pm --help/per-command help on this workspace to complete the baseline, then re-run the full set after each pm-n7rr consolidation lands.
